description: Migrate admin app from Convex useQuery to ConvexQueryClient + TanStack Query for SSR, streaming, prefetch-on-hover, and Suspense-based loading states

userStories.title: Install dependencies and configure router with ConvexQueryClient
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TanStack Query + Convex integration packages installed and the router configured so Convex queries can run through TanStack Query on both server and client.
acceptanceCriteria: Install @convex-dev/react-query, @tanstack/react-query, and @tanstack/react-router-with-query in apps/admin
apps/admin/src/router.tsx creates ConvexReactClient, ConvexQueryClient, and QueryClient with correct wiring (hashFn, queryFn, connect)
Router created via routerWithQueryClient() with { queryClient, convexClient, convexQueryClient } in context
Router Wrap renders <ConvexProvider> around children
RouterContext type is exported for use by root route
defaultPreload: 'intent' is enabled on the router
Existing pages still load and function (backwards compatible — Convex useQuery still works inside ConvexProvider)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the foundation. Read @convex-dev/react-query docs carefully. Verify no Node.js-specific APIs are pulled in — app runs on Cloudflare Workers. ConvexQueryClient's serverHttpClient uses fetch which is available in Workers.

userStories.title: Rewrite root route with server-side auth token and provider restructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the root route to fetch the Clerk auth token server-side and set it on ConvexQueryClient's HTTP client so SSR queries can authenticate against Convex.
acceptanceCriteria: Root route uses createRootRouteWithContext<RouterContext>()()
beforeLoad calls a server function that fetches Clerk token via auth().getToken({ template: 'convex' }) and sets it on convexQueryClient.serverHttpClient?.setAuth(token)
shellComponent (RootDocument) contains only HTML shell: <html>, <head>, <body>, ThemeProvider, <Scripts> — no data providers
Root route component (RootLayout) renders ClerkProvider → ConvexProviderWithClerk → <Outlet> + <Toaster>
ConvexProviderWithClerk receives convexClient from route context and useAuth from Clerk
Module-level ConvexReactClient instantiation removed from __root.tsx (moved to router.tsx in US-001)
App loads without console errors
Clerk UI components (SignIn, UserButton) still render correctly
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Provider nesting order matters: Router Wrap provides ConvexProvider (for SSR). Root route component provides ConvexProviderWithClerk (for client auth). Both share the same ConvexReactClient instance. The inner provider overrides the outer context. Moving ClerkProvider from shellComponent to component changes SSR rendering order — verify Clerk UI still works.

userStories.title: Migrate _authenticated.tsx to ensureQueryData + useSuspenseQuery
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the authenticated layout to use ConvexQueryClient integration instead of the manual ConvexHttpClient workaround.
acceptanceCriteria: ConvexHttpClient import and manual server-side prefetch logic removed
convex/browser import removed
Route loader uses ensureQueryData(convexQuery(api.users.me, {})) to prefetch user data
Component uses useSuspenseQuery(convexQuery(api.users.me, {})) instead of useQuery from convex/react
The prefetchedUser / liveUser fallback pattern removed
The if (user === undefined) loading state removed
beforeLoad auth guard (redirect to /login if unauthenticated) kept
Null check (webhook not synced yet) and user.role !== 'admin' check kept
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the ONLY route that uses a blocking loader with ensureQueryData — needed for the admin role gate. All other routes will stream via Suspense. The loader receives context with queryClient and convexQueryClient.

userStories.title: Migrate dashboard page to useSuspenseQuery
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the dashboard page to stream server-rendered content instead of showing a client-side loading state.
acceptanceCriteria: useQuery from convex/react replaced with useSuspenseQuery from @tanstack/react-query + convexQuery from @convex-dev/react-query
if (data === undefined) loading check removed
Skeleton pendingComponent added to route definition matching the dashboard layout
useMutation/useAction from convex/react remain unchanged (if any)
Real-time updates still work
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: File: apps/admin/src/routes/_authenticated/dashboard.tsx. Dashboard was recently rewritten (US-018 of admin-ux-improvements) as a landing page with stat cards, org links, recent activity, and shortcuts.

userStories.title: Migrate organisationer index page to useSuspenseQuery
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the organizations list page to use useSuspenseQuery with skeleton pendingComponent.
acceptanceCriteria: useQuery replaced with useSuspenseQuery + convexQuery
Existing skeleton loading state extracted to pendingComponent
Inline if (orgs === undefined) check removed
useMutation calls (create, update) remain on convex/react
Creating/updating an organization updates the table without manual cache invalidation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: File: apps/admin/src/routes/_authenticated/admin.organisationer.index.tsx. Mutations auto-propagate to TanStack Query cache via Convex subscriptions — no manual invalidation needed.

userStories.title: Migrate användare page to useSuspenseQuery
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the users management page to use useSuspenseQuery with skeleton pendingComponent.
acceptanceCriteria: Both useQuery calls (api.userAdmin.list, api.organizations.list) replaced with useSuspenseQuery + convexQuery
Existing skeleton loading state extracted to pendingComponent
Inline if (users === undefined || orgs === undefined) check removed
useAction calls (create, update, deactivate, activate, remove) remain on convex/react
User actions (create, edit, deactivate) update the table automatically
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: File: apps/admin/src/routes/_authenticated/admin.anvandare.tsx. Has debounced search — the debouncedSearch state drives the query args. useSuspenseQuery re-fetches when args change.

userStories.title: Migrate conditional query routes (sök, global search)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need search pages to use TanStack Query's enabled pattern instead of Convex's 'skip' pattern for conditional queries.
acceptanceCriteria: sok.tsx: useQuery(api.search.global, query ? {...} : 'skip') replaced with useQuery({ ...convexQuery(api.search.global, {...}), enabled: !!query }) from @tanstack/react-query
global-search.tsx: Same pattern with enabled: !!debouncedSearch
Loading/empty states use isPending or isFetching from query result (not data === undefined)
Search works: type query → results appear, clear query → results disappear
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: These use useQuery (not useSuspenseQuery) because they are conditionally enabled. enabled: false returns { data: undefined, isPending: true }. Use isPending/isFetching for loading states.

userStories.title: Migrate feature components with Suspense wrappers
userStories.description: As a developer, I need org-scoped feature components to use useSuspenseQuery with parent Suspense boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: org-register-view.tsx: All useQuery calls replaced with useSuspenseQuery + convexQuery
org-modernization-view.tsx: All useQuery calls replaced with useSuspenseQuery + convexQuery
org-maintenance-view.tsx: All useQuery calls replaced with useSuspenseQuery + convexQuery
org-users-view.tsx: useQuery calls replaced; useAction calls remain on convex/react
Each component's parent wraps it in <Suspense fallback={<Skeleton />}> with an appropriate skeleton
Inline if (data === undefined) checks removed from each component
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Files: apps/admin/src/features/organization/components/org-*.tsx. Parent is admin.organisationer.$id.tsx — wrap each tab view in <Suspense>. The skeletons should match each view's layout.

userStories.title: Migrate conditional feature hooks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need conditional query hooks to use TanStack Query's enabled pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: hissnummer-field.tsx: useQuery replaced with useQuery from @tanstack/react-query + convexQuery + enabled flag
use-suggestions.ts: useQuery replaced with useSuspenseQuery + convexQuery
use-import-machine.ts: useQuery calls replaced with useQuery from @tanstack/react-query + convexQuery + enabled flags; useAction remains on convex/react
State machine logic in use-import-machine.ts still functions correctly
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: These are non-route hooks used inside feature components. Conditional queries use enabled flag (same pattern as US-016). use-import-machine.ts has complex state machine logic — be careful not to break the analyze-only-when-conditions-met behavior.

userStories.title: Clean up deprecated code and unused exports
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove code made obsolete by the migration.
acceptanceCriteria: ConvexHttpClient and convex/browser imports fully removed from _authenticated.tsx
Module-level ConvexReactClient removed from __root.tsx
ConvexClerkProvider removed from packages/auth/src/provider.tsx if unused elsewhere
packages/auth/src/index.ts still exports ConvexProviderWithClerk (used in root route)
All 'as ... | undefined' type assertions that were Convex useQuery workarounds removed where no longer needed
No remaining imports of useQuery from convex/react in migrated files (except files that only use useMutation/useAction)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Final cleanup pass. Grep for 'from "convex/react"' to find remaining useQuery imports. Grep for 'ConvexHttpClient' and 'convex/browser' to find leftover workaround code. Only remove code that is truly unused after the migration.
